title: Hojicha Whipped Cream Parfaits
description: Delightful and unique dessert parfaits made with hojicha-infused whipped cream, salty caramel, and saudi dates.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, whip the cream until it begins to thicken.
Add the hojicha and continue whipping until stiff peaks form.
In a separate bowl, create a layer of salty caramel sauce on the bottom.
Add a layer of whipped cream on top of the caramel sauce.
Arrange the saudi dates on top of the whipped cream layer.
Repeat the layers one more time, ending with a layer of whipped cream on top.
Garnish with additional saudi dates and serve.
